name: @webenvoy/cli
description: WebEnvoy CLI minimal runtime entry for FR-0001

scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:extension
scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run && bash tests/pr-guardian.merge-guard.test.sh
scripts.test:suites: npm run build && WEBENVOY_CLI_CONTRACT_BUILD_SESSION=$(date +%s%N) WEBENVOY_CLI_CONTRACT_RUNTIME_PREBUILT=1 vitest --config vitest.suite.config.ts run
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:runtime && npm run typecheck:extension
